This is the operational bot account used for automated maintenance on shinto.miraheze.org, it is also used on lifeism.miraheze.org and aelaki.miraheze.org

Its purpose is to run repeatable cleanup and migration tasks with transparent logging, persistent state files, and auditable edit summaries tied to GitHub Actions workflow runs.

Repository: https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts

== Operations policy ==

All routine bot edits run through '''GitHub Actions''', not from a local machine. Scripts are committed to the repository and triggered automatically or via manual dispatch. Local runs are only used for emergencies.

== Immediate / in progress ==
<!-- BOT-IMMEDIATE:START -->
<!-- BOT-IMMEDIATE:END -->

== Tasks ==

See [[User:EmmaBot]] for current tasks being done cleaning up this wiki.

=== Current tasks ===

* normalize talk pages
* normalize category pages
* remove crud categories
* triage [[:Category:Categories autocreated by EmmaBot]] into [[:Category:Emmabot categories with enwiki]] and [[:Category:Emmabot categories without enwiki]]

=== Future tasks ===

* normalization of template categories
* enrich [[:Category:Categories autocreated by EmmaBot]] subcategories with proper content
